TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Broncho_Billy_Anderson, title = Broncho_Billy_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Broncho_Billy_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Broncho Billy Anderson kawas tay 1880, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 3, Broncho Billy Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1971) qnxan nya Anderson htagan beh sa Maxwell Henry Aronson. hiya sswe kneril Leona Anderson ga squilq psibay ru ppqwas. qutux ngasal nya ga Jewish ramu. hiya ga yutas ru yaki aring Prussia musa Amelika, yaya aring Russian Empire musa Amelika. Anderson cyugal kawas lga, qutux ngasal musa Arkansas, Pine Bluff. tehok spat kawas lga, cingasal musa Louis, Missouri. mopuw spat kawas lga, hiya ga musa New York. 1903 kawas lga, Anderson mstnaq ta Edwin S. Porter, 擔任 squilq psibay. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

Broncho Billy Anderson kawas tay 1880, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 3, Broncho Billy Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1971) qnxan nya Anderson htagan beh sa Maxwell Henry Aronson. hiya sswe kneril Leona Anderson ga squilq psibay ru ppqwas. qutux ngasal nya ga Jewish ramu. hiya ga yutas ru yaki aring Prussia musa Amelika, yaya aring Russian Empire musa Amelika. Anderson cyugal kawas lga, qutux ngasal musa Arkansas, Pine Bluff. tehok spat kawas lga, cingasal musa Louis, Missouri. mopuw spat kawas lga, hiya ga musa New York. 1903 kawas lga, Anderson mstnaq ta Edwin S. Porter, 擔任 squilq psibay. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: βronʦ~ʨħo βillj an*ers~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βronʦ~ʨħo βillj an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja an*ers~ɕon ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa maxwell ħenrj arons~ɕon. ħija s~ɕs~ɕwe kneril leona an*ers~ɕon ɣa s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj ru ppqwas~ɕ. qutux ŋas~ɕal nja ɣa *ewis~ɕħ ramu. ħija ɣa jutas~ɕ ru jaki ariŋ prus~ɕs~ɕia mus~ɕa amelika, jaja ariŋ rus~ɕs~ɕian empire mus~ɕa amelika. an*ers~ɕon ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ lɣa, qutux ŋas~ɕal mus~ɕa arkans~ɕas~ɕ, pine βlu**. teħok s~ɕpat kawas~ɕ lɣa, ʦ~ʨiŋas~ɕal mus~ɕa louis~ɕ, mis~ɕs~ɕouri. mopuw s~ɕpat kawas~ɕ lɣa, ħija ɣa mus~ɕa new jork. **** kawas~ɕ lɣa, an*ers~ɕon ms~ɕtnaq ta e*win s~ɕ. porter, ** s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
